zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Brienne於大約1225年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾勞加內時，他的父親Guy de Brienne24歲，母親Jane Pole24歲。他於大約1250年與Joan Pole結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1307年在威爾士布洛可爾瓦爾恩斯 卡素享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de Brienne于大约1225年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾勞加內时，他的父亲Guy de Brienne24岁，母亲Jane Pole24岁。他于大约1250年与Joan Pole结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1307年在威尔士布洛可爾瓦爾恩斯 卡素享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Brienne was born about 1225, in Laugharne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Guy de Brienne, was 24 and his mother, Jane Pole, was 24. He married Joan Pole about 1250. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1307, in Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Brienne est né environ 1225, à Laugharne, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Guy de Brienne, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Jane Pole, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Pole environ 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1307, à Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Brienne um 1225 in Laugharne, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Brienne 24 und seine Mutter Jane Pole 24. Er hat um 1250 Joan Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1307 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Brienne(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 로그하른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Brienne(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Pole(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 Joan Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1307년 웨일스 p브로케실르 월w이'스 카스틀에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Brienne nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Laugharne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Guy de Brienne, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Jane Pole, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Pole aproximadamente 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1307, em Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Brienne родился около 1225 г. в местности лоарн, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Guy de Brienne было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Pole, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Pole около 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1307 г. в местности валвин'с кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Brienne nació aproximadamente 1225, en Laugharne, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Guy de Brienne, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Jane Pole, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Pole aproximadamente 1250. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1307, en Walwyn's Castle, Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 83 años.
